name: Showpad Sales Enablement API
what_it_does: Showpad REST API for sales enablement and content management platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve sales content, track buyer engagement analytics, manage content libraries and tags, access coaching data, and integrate Showpad into CRM and marketing workflows. Showpad is used by revenue teams to surface the right content at the right time in the sales process.
use_cases: Retrieving sales content and assets from sales workflow agents
Tracking buyer engagement with shared content from revenue analytics agents
Managing content tagging and organization from marketing operations agents
Integrating Showpad content performance into CRM opportunity management agents
not_for: SMB without structured sales content management needs
best_when: An enterprise revenue team using Showpad wants AI agents to surface relevant content, monitor buyer engagement, and sync enablement data with CRM systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement behavioral tracking requires consent and governance. Enterprise-only platform.

auth.notes: Showpad API uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code and client credentials flows. Developer access through Showpad developer portal. Enterprise account required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential and Plus plans; pricing per user per month
pricing.notes: Enterprise sales enablement pricing. Contact Showpad sales. Headquartered in Belgium with EU-native design.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement tracking is behavioral data requiring consent
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Belgium-headquartered company — strong EU privacy compliance but sales process may differ
Showpad Developer Portal requires enterprise account access for full API docs
Content model (Channels, Dividers, Experiences) has Showpad-specific concepts to learn
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement behavioral data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR native (EU HQ). OAuth2 with scopes. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Buyer engagement data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR (EU native). OAuth2 with scopes.
